lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Ha Ha! Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: I'm Sigurd the Great and Brainy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do they call you the Great and Brainy?

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Because I invented the Log Canoe!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Log Canoe?

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Yeash! Me and my cousins were having a great party by the river when we decided to have a game of 'Smack The Tree'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Smack the Tree?

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: It's a game were you take it in turnsh shmacking a tree. First one to uproot the tree winsh!

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Anyway, I won the game with a flying tackle. The tree came loose and down the river bank I went, still holding the tree.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: I woke up a few hours later and found myself several miles down river. And thatsh how I invented the log canoe!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you invented the 'Log Canoe' by falling into a river hugging a tree?

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Well I refined the design from the original you know!

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: I cut all the branches off to make it more comfortable. I could tell you how to if you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, not right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teach me about canoes?

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Well, you don't look like you have the skill to make a canoe.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: You need to have at least level 12 woodcutting.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Once you are able to make a canoe it makes travel along the river much quicker!

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: It's really quite simple. Just walk down to that tree on the bank and chop it down.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Then take your axe to it and shape it how you like!

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: You can make a log canoe like mine! It'll get you 1 stop down the river.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: There's some snooty fella down near the Champions Guild who reckons his canoes are better than mine. He's never said it to my face though.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: You could make a Dugout canoe with your woodcutting skill, but I don't see why you would want to.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Well, you're pretty handy with an axe!

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: You could make Stable Dugout canoes, like that snooty fella Tarquin.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: He reckons his canoes are better than mine. He's never said it to my face though.

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: You look like you know your way around a tree, you can make a Waka canoe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a Waka?

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: I've only ever seen Hari using them. People say he's found a way to canoe the river underground and into the Wilderness

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: Hari hangs around up near Edgeville

lines.speaker: Sigurd
lines.text: He's a nice bloke.
